prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: SON-ASRT-HAWKBILLKNIFE-BLK-BUN-FBA Product Type: KNIFE Brand (from catalog): ASR Tactical Existing Title: ASR Tactical 7" Hawkbill Full Tang Fixed Blade Knife with Sheath and Lanyard, Matte Black Description: For everyday use, martial arts, combat or tactical scenarios, and even for camping, hunting and fishing, the ASR Tactical 7 Inch Full Tang Hawkbill Blade Karambit Knife is extremely versatile in many different environments. As for the anatomy of this tactical knife, it’s intentionally designed with a curved, downward sloping tip, with full tang hawkbill blade, making it ideal for pull cutting applications where slicing and controlled cutting methods are required. This knife can cover everything from skinning elk or small game, cleaning a fish, cutting through tough rope, carving, whittling, fashioning kindling and more.

For tactical purposes, the inward curve allows for controlled slashes, making it an effective choice for self defense, martial arts or combat situations (blade length measures 3.25 inches). Engineered for power, precision and control, the razor sharp, corrosion resistant blade effortlessly slices through a myriad of different materials. The full tang 440 stainless steel construction ensures that the blade weight is more evenly distributed, making it easier to control, ensuring structural integrity and maximum strength during handling.

The built in finger hole enhances grip and control over the blade by providing an additional point of contact; knife also features finger groves, a textured handle, and top thumb groove to improve leverage, extraction and ensures more precise blade manipulation. The ergonomic handle provides a secure and comfortable grip, ensuring that the knife remains firmly in hand even when wet or slippery.

Lastly, the included sheath with lanyard offers convenient and safe carrying, ensuring your knife is always within reach when you need it, whether on or off person. Whether you’re hunting, camping, exploring the wilderness or practicing your tactical knife skills, this full tang hawkbill blade knife from ASR Tactical is built to handle it all with confidence and precision. Search Terms: Utility combat karambit tactical knife; fixed blade knife; gifts for men; husband gifts; edc; knives; self defense; bug out bag; survival kit; knife sheath; private investigator equipment; emergency preparedness items; first responder; martial arts Features: - TACTICAL KNIFE: This knife also makes a great tactical knife, as the inward curve allows for controlled slashes, making it an effective choice for self defense, martial arts or combat situations; overall length: 7 inches; blade length: 3.25 inches - INTEGRATED FINGER HOLE: Engineered finger hole enhances grip and control over the blade by providing an additional point of contact; knife also features finger groves, a textured handle, and top thumb groove to improve leverage, extraction and ensures more precise blade manipulation - UTILITY KNIFE: Designed with a curved, downward sloping point, this knife has a full tang hawkbill blade that is ideal for pull cutting applications where slicing and controlled cutting methods are required; full knife length measures seven inches - 440 STAINLESS STEEL: Incredibly durable, this knife boasts excellent edge retention and resistance to potential rust and corrosion; tactical knife features an all matte black finish, including knife sheath and lanyard - SHEATH WITH LANYARD: Included sheath with built in lanyard offers convenient access and safe carrying on or off your person, ensuring the knife is always within reach when needed; weighs in at 0.40lbs === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Provide a title for the item that may be customer facing === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}

anthropic.item_name: ASR Tactical 7" Hawkbill Fixed Blade Knife, Matte Black

openai.item_name: ASR Tactical 7-in Matte Black Hawkbill Fixed Blade Knife

anthropic.title_differentiation: Full Tang 440 Stainless Steel, Tactical And Utility, Integrated Finger Hole, Includes Sheath With Lanyard
